# Project Buildup History: Windows CPU-Only Offline AI Application

- Repository: `windows-offline-ai-app`
- Category: `ops_platform`
- Subtype: `generic`
- Source: `project_buildup_2021_2025_daily_plan.csv`
## 2024-06-05 - Day 1: Problem discovery start

- Task summary: Started this one by sitting down and trying to understand what Windows CPU-Only Offline AI Application should actually become. I did not rush into code yet. The main thing here was to write down the operational problem Windows CPU-Only Offline AI Application is meant to solve and who feels the pain so the project had a decent base. I was still mostly figuring out the shape of it, so a lot of the day went into small notes and half clear ideas. A lot of the work here was really about workflow thinking, not just screens or files.
- Deliverable: By the end of the day I had problem brief written down in a rough way, which was enough to stop guessing and move into the next step. It was not super polished, just stable enough that I felt okay moving forward.
